use_cases: Tab-based navigation for documentation or product feature pages
Sticky section headers that remain visible during scroll for better UX
Content organization with tabbed navigation for long-form pages
Multi-section layouts with persistent navigation anchors
ai_summary: A sticky navigation component with tabbed sections that stays fixed at the top during scroll. Features a dark theme with black background and white text, responsive design with Tailwind CSS breakpoints, and customizable styling through className props. Designed for content-heavy pages requiring persistent navigation like documentation, product pages, or category-based content organization.
